name: mol-slice-pipeline
description: 8-step pipeline for implementing a single slice: research through report

slice_description.description: Short description of what the slice covers

slice_files.description: Comma-separated list of file paths assigned to this slice

steps.title: Research: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Research the codebase and requirements for {{slice_name}} ({{slice_type}}). {{slice_description}}. Files: {{slice_files}}

steps.title: Plan: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Create implementation plan for {{slice_name}}. Define approach, risks, and acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Test Design: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Design test cases for {{slice_name}}. Cover edge cases and integration points.

steps.title: Test Implement: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Implement test cases for {{slice_name}} as designed in the test-design step.

steps.title: Test Verify: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Verify test scaffolding compiles and tests fail as expected (red phase).

steps.title: Implement: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Implement {{slice_name}} to make all tests pass. Files: {{slice_files}}

steps.title: Verify: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Verify implementation of {{slice_name}}. All tests pass, no regressions, code quality checks.

steps.title: Report: {{slice_name}}
steps.description: Write completion report for {{slice_name}}. Summarize changes, test results, and any follow-up items.
